title: Network policy v0.1
description: Policy for coordination network simulator: delay, drop, partition schedule, reorder. Deterministic when used with a seeded RNG.

delay.description: Delay distribution (ms). Used to sample per-message latency.

drop_rate.description: Probability each message is dropped (per agent).

reorder_window.description: Max steps messages can be reordered (0 = no reorder).

partition_schedule.description: Time intervals during which a subset of agents is partitioned (no delivery to them).

affected_agents.description: Agent IDs that do not receive messages during [start_t, end_t]. If omitted, empty or null, no partition (interval ignored).

affected_agent_fraction.description: Alternative to affected_agents: fraction of agents to partition (resolved at reset from RNG).
